COMPLEX LITIGATION, DEPT. 606, FEB-25-2025 EVIDENTIARY HEARING HELD RE: DEFENDANT BWW RESOURCES, LLC'S 1.) MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION OF PLAINTIFF'S INDIVIDUAL CLAIMS AND DISMISS CLASS CLAIMS, AND REQUEST FOR SANCTION, AND 2.) MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION OF PLAINTIFF'S INDIVIDUAL PAGA CLAIMS AND STAY REPRESENTATIVE CLAIMS, AND REQUEST FOR SANCTIONS. THE COURT RULES AS FOLLOWS: 1.) DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION OF PLAINTIFF'S INDIVIDUAL CLAIMS AND DISMISS CLASS CLAIMS IS GRANTED; 2.) DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION OF PLAINTIFF'S INDIVIDUAL PAGA CLAIMS AND STAY REPRESENTATIVE CLAIMS IS GRANTED; AND 3.) AS TO DEFENDANT'S REQUESTS FOR SANCTIONS, DEFENDANT MAY BRING ITS REQUEST BY WAY OF A SEPARATE MOTION. PARTIES ARE TO UPDATE THE COURT ON THE ISSUE OF A SANCTIONS MOTION VIA A JOINT CMC STATEMENT TO SUBMITTED BY 3/4/25. JUDGE: JEFFREY S. ROSS; CLERK: S. KANE; COURT REPORTER: AMY L. GOODING, CSR NO. 13386, TEL: 408-828-0981, EMAIL: GOODINGS@SBCGLOBAL.NET (606)
